filters.name: Operation risk scoring
filters.summary: Assigns a baseline risk score based on the call's operation class (file_read, file_write, shell, network, etc).

filters.name: Static path matching
filters.summary: Aho-Corasick scan of paths against curated denylists and allowlists. Hot — runs against every fs operation.

filters.name: Sensitive path heuristic
filters.summary: Detects access to known-sensitive files: .env*, id_rsa, id_ed25519, credentials.json, .aws/, .ssh/, .kube/, and similar.

filters.name: Allowlist / denylist
filters.summary: User-managed allow and deny rules. Approved entries lower the score; explicit denies raise it. Edited from the digest review UI.

filters.name: Argument length & structure
filters.summary: Flags suspicious argument shapes: encoded payloads, oversized strings, shell metacharacters in unexpected positions.

filters.name: Capability enforcement
filters.summary: Hard gate: enforces per-profile capability grants. Returns DENY when the active supervisor profile does not permit this operation class.

filters.name: Secret / credential scanning
filters.summary: Scans content for embedded credentials. 1,600+ regex patterns covering provider API keys, tokens, private keys, and bespoke credential formats.

filters.name: Command structure analysis
filters.summary: Parses shell commands. Catches dangerous patterns: piped curl-to-sh, sudo with arbitrary scripts, fork-bombs, base64-encoded payloads in subshells.

filters.name: Egress policy
filters.summary: Network destination policy. Allowlisted hosts lower the score; denylisted or unknown hosts raise it. Plays with the reputation filter for adaptive trust.

filters.name: DLP gate
filters.summary: Scans outbound network payloads for sensitive data leaving the box: credentials, PII, large file contents bundled into POST bodies.

filters.name: Canary secret detection
filters.summary: Hard DENY. Detects registered canary tokens (fake secrets seeded in your repo) reaching any outbound sink — definitive proof of exfiltration.

filters.name: Destination reputation
filters.summary: Per-destination trust accumulated over time. Established trusted hosts get a discount; suspicious or unfamiliar ones get a markup.

filters.name: Behavioural anomaly
filters.summary: Compares the current call against the session's historical baseline (default 200-call minimum). Sudden bursts, unusual destinations, or out-of-pattern operations contribute score.

filters.name: Taint tracking
filters.summary: Tracks data flow from sensitive sources (e.g. a .env read) through subsequent operations. Network calls or shell execs after a sensitive read inherit taint.

filters.name: Session containment
filters.summary: Enforces per-session isolation zones. A session bound to project A cannot reach project B's files or network without explicit cross-zone approval.

filters.name: Rate limiting
filters.summary: Per-minute caps on file writes (default 30), shell execs (20), and network requests (60). Bursts trigger queue; sustained violations trigger DENY.

filters.name: Semantic analysis
filters.summary: Stub for v0.1. Local embedding-based intent classification. Disabled by default; full implementation planned for v1.5.
